name: cloudbridge-hybrid-cloud-platform
description: Sustainable Hybrid-Cloud Modernization Platform — Atos Tech Foundations alignment

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix iot-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix iot-service
